title: Repository Baseline, Go 1.26 Toolchain, Modules, and Reproduction · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs repository baseline, go 1.26 toolchain, modules, and reproduction from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reproducible Go Pokedex repository baseline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, an…
objectives: Inspect revision, branch, worktree, ignored files, configuration, tests, fixtures, secrets, licenses, and recovery anchor before editing.
Record Go 1.26.5, GOOS, GOARCH, GOTOOLCHAIN, module mode, build tags, and supported platform matrix.
Choose module path, command and internal package boundaries, dependency direction, and import visibility before growth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
